rule_definitions.combined_risk_rule: BLOCK when global PF+drawdown deteriorates, or SELL PF < 1 during SELL, or unfavorable rate plus loss streak is high. CAUTION uses slower 100-window versions.
rule_definitions.q2_like_proxy: BLOCK when rolling_pf_50 < 1, rolling_drawdown_50 >= 13.0 and rolling_unfavorable_rate_50 >= 0.46. CAUTION adds slower 100-window deterioration or SELL PF deterioration with high sell loss streak.
rule_definitions.rolling_pf_below_1_and_drawdown_high: BLOCK when rolling_pf_50 < 1 and rolling_drawdown_50 >= 13.0. CAUTION uses rolling_pf_100 < 1 and rolling_drawdown_100 >= 18.0.
rule_definitions.rolling_sell_pf_below_1: BLOCK when predicted_direction is SELL and rolling_sell_pf_50 < 1. CAUTION when SELL and rolling_sell_pf_100 < 1 or rolling_sell_avg_R_50 < 0.

technical_decisions: Rules use natural PF < 1 risk cuts and high-risk thresholds estimated from train only.
No model is trained in this script.
No date, month, quarter or 2026Q2 flag is used to trigger a rule.
The 2026Q2 analysis is loaded for comparison only, not for rule execution.
BLOCK mode blocks only strong rule hits; CAUTION blocks only warning hits; BLOCK+CAUTION blocks both.
